case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE VS. THOMAS AREVALO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, THOMAS AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-13-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-02-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INDEMNITY EXCHANGE SERVED JUL-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AREVALO, THOMAS AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-17-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-21-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-21-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
